entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Eztabaidatu anbizioaz Steve Jobsekin"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Eztabaidatu klima-politikaz Greta Thunbergekin"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Eztabaidatu justiziaz Batmanekin"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Debate with a personality inspir-en erabiltzeko gida praktikoa, argudio-ikaskuntzarako, promptak, ikasketa-zikloak eta AI ohitura seguruagoak barne.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendoagoa

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argudioa

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat azken erantzunaren ordez.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko, ez emaitza bakarrik.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Aukeratu nortasun bat.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Eztabaidatu pertsonaia batekin

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: AI erabiliz nortasun batekin eztabaidatzea AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: izendatu benetako edo fikziozko nortasun bat eta eztabaidatu harekin edozein gairi buruz. AIak haren estilo publikoa eta mundu-ikuspegia kanalizatzen ditu, debatea bidezkoa mantenduz.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: AI erabiliz nortasun batekin eztabaidatu: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu ideia oroimenez berriro idatziz.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Ahots gogoangarriekin eta erronka bidezkoarekin eztabaida-praktika bizia nahi duten ikasleak.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Praktikatu erantzunak.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Probatzeko promptak

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Ezarri gai bat.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Hasi modu bizia Debate with a personality-n. Alboko ikaskuntza-formatu bat nahi baduzu, probatu Debate any topic. Plataformaren ikuspegi zabalagorako, irakurri AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztientzat zer egin beharko lukeen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Esan moduari zer ikasi edo ekoitzi nahi duzun.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Eztabaidak estilo publikoa eta mundu-ikuspegia erabiltzen ditu, sinesmen pribatuak ezagutzen dituela itxuratu gabe.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hau da AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe ikastearen atzean dagoen ohitura bera: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AI erabilgarriena da zure pentsamenduari buruzko feedbacka ematen dizunean.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Modu hau bereziki erabilgarria da honako hau nahi duten ikasleentzat:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zure hitzekin.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Debate with a personality azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Modu honek zertan laguntzen duen

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Nora joan hurrena

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Zure benetako arazoaren bertsio zirriborro batekin ere has zaitezke. Lehen prompt nahasia ondo dago. Saioak maila, audientzia, epea eta estiloa argitu ditzake behin hasten zarenean.
